title: Safe sleep - Canada.ca
content:
Safe sleep tips for your baby’s sleep environment.

## Services and information

### Safe sleep for every sleep
Important information about your baby's sleep safety.

### Cribs, cradles and bassinets
Buying a crib, cradle or bassinet that's safe for your child.

### Safe sleep on the go
What to do if your baby falls asleep in a stroller, baby carrier or car seat.

### Dressing your baby for sleep
Safety tips for baby clothing designed for sleep, sleep sacks and preventing overheating.

### Sudden infant death syndrome
Learn how to create a safe sleep environment for your baby to reduce the risk of sudden infant death syndrome.

### Setting up a safe nursery
Baby room ideas, crib placement, securing furniture, toy safety; baby items your nursery doesn't need.

### Infant safe sleep tips for grandparents
Create a safe sleep environment for your grandbabies.

### Indigenous safe sleep resources
Safe sleep resources for Indigenous people and communities.

### Safe sleep publications
Downloadable and printable safe sleep publications.

## For healthcare professionals and stakeholders
Learn how to participate in Safe Sleep Week.

### Safe sleep image guidance
Tips for choosing images that reflect safe sleep environments and practices.
